NTC OF MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND DEMAND FOR INSPECTION, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH INSURANCE EXCHANGE HEARING SET FOR MAR-12-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND DEMAND FOR INSPECTION IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 301 TO BE HEARD AT 9:00 A.M. ON THE SAME DATE. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONERS AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH INSURANCE'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND DEMAND FOR INSPECTION IS GRANTED. RESPONDENTS SHALL SERVE RESPONSES TO ALL OUTSTANDING INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR DOCUMENTS BY MAY 1, 2013. ORDER SIGNED. BRUCE HIGHMAN, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Ntc Of Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection
Off Calendar Mar-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection is transferred to Department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on the same date. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Petitioners Aaa Northern California, Nevada & Utah Insurance'S Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection
Off Calendar Mar-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Mark Carbone, Law Offices of MacMorris & Carbone, 510.267.7270, appearing for the Petitioner;
Amy Giang, 415.728.3278, appearing for the Respondent.

Discussions held. Ruling: Petitioners AAA Northern California, Nevada & Utah Insurance's Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection is granted. Respondents shall serve responses to all outstanding interrogatories and requests for documents by May 1, 2013. Order signed. Bruce Highman, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =(302/JPT)
